name: Vegetable and Chicken Pot Pie
recipeIngredient: 10 3/4 oz Can Condensed cream of chicken soup
16 oz Frozen vegetables (combination of broccoli, cauliflower and carrots), thawed
1 can Hungry Jack Refrigerated Flaky Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, melt margarine.
2. Add celery and cook over medium-high heat until crisp-tender.
3. Stir in soup, milk, onion powder, thyme, and pepper; mix well.
4. Stir in vegetables and chicken; heat through.
5. Spoon mixture into a 12x8-inch baking dish.
6. Preheat oven to 375°F.
7. Separate dough into 10 biscuits.
8. Cut each biscuit into 4 pieces.
9. Arrange biscuits over hot filling.
10. Bake at 375°F for 20-25 minutes or until biscuits are golden brown and filling is bubbly.
